## Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Simulation path reviewed if behavior changed

## Safety Review

- [ ] No harmful deterrence methods introduced
- [ ] Safety policy remains non-bypassable
- [ ] Human and pet exclusion behavior preserved
- [ ] Any actuator changes remain bounded and mockable
